name: Lower East Side Lox
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Lox Or Smoked Salmon; Cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the cream cheese to a smooth consistency and blend in the sour cream.
2. Mix in the lox thoroughly.
3. Stir in all of the other ingredients.
4. Cover and chill.
Makes about 2 1/2 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: Bagel Chips, Tomatoes, Radishes, Cucumber, Scallions, and Figs.
